info.title: Finance API
info.description: Finance backend — Fastify 5 + Zod + Drizzle. Custom JWT + Google Sign-In auth.

post.summary: Exchange a Google ID token for app access + refresh tokens

idToken.description: Google ID token obtained by the mobile app via Google Sign-In

post.summary: Development-only login without Google (mints app tokens by email)

email.description: Any email — provisions/logs in a dev user (development only)

post.summary: Rotate a refresh token for a new access + refresh pair

get.summary: List households the caller belongs to
List members of the active household

delete.summary: Remove a member (owner) or leave the household (self)

post.summary: Create a shareable invite code for the active household

get.summary: List active invitations for the active household

post.summary: Redeem an invite code to join a household
Create an account in the active household

get.summary: List accounts in the active household

post.summary: Create a custom category in the active household

get.summary: List transactions in the active household

post.summary: Import transactions from an OFX/CSV statement or receipt text
Parse + categorize a statement without persisting (review step)
Persist the reviewed transactions from a preview

get.summary: Get the household's AI insights (generating if stale)
